problem.statement: SCE needs a smaller, phaseable spec group for IDE delivery projection and engineering onboarding instead of broad mixed specs.
problem.scope: Phase-1 IDE-facing delivery projection and engineering onboarding contract planning, excluding project-level multi-agent runtime implementation.
problem.symptom: Current draft specs mix phase ordering and onboarding concerns too broadly to support steady implementation.

business_rule: engine owns semantics and adapters own presentation

hypotheses.statement: A tighter spec group will reduce blind implementation and make the IDE feature easier to land.

risks.statement: Project onboarding and collaboration runtime concerns may be mixed again if the program boundary is not explicit.

decision_execution_path.decision: split phase-1 into delivery projection, preview/open, and scaffold/ownership
keep multi-agent runtime outside this task line
execute child specs in phase order instead of parallel blind implementation

actions: attach debug evidence when boundary drift repeats
